about_us: At Stackular, we are more than just a team – we are a product development community driven by a shared vision. Our values shape who we are, what we do, and how we interact with our peers and our customers. We're not just seeking any regular engineer; we want individuals who identify with our core values and are passionate about software development.

questions.label: Role Description
questions.help: Describe the role in your own words. Include responsibilities, what the person will work on, technologies they'll use, and any special requirements. LLM will analyze this to generate skills and detailed responsibilities.
questions.example: We're looking for an AI/ML engineer to work on autonomous agents. You'll design and experiment with AI agents, build workflows using LangChain and RAG pipelines, integrate APIs and databases, run experiments, and contribute to innovation projects. Should have strong Python skills, ML fundamentals, and familiarity with LLMs.

note: HR fills 8 basic fields + role description. LLM analyzes the role_info to generate: responsibilities, required skills, nice-to-have skills, and target audience.
